final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster reimagining 大话西游 in a 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90年代港片 film aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include foreground couple embracing against a city wall, two figures standing in the distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a kiss against a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the background (distant)
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic city wall setting with cinematic depth
Lighting/mood: needs a 90年代港片 dramatic, melancholic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded, filmic direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a film-grain surface treatment — exact grain level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
